questions.q: In which year was the film RRR released in theatres?
questions.explanation: RRR was released on 25 March 2022.

questions.q: Who directed the 2022 film RRR?
questions.explanation: RRR was directed by S. S. Rajamouli.

questions.q: In which Indian language was the film RRR originally made?
questions.explanation: RRR was originally made in Telugu, then dubbed and released in multiple languages.

questions.q: Which song from the film RRR won the 2023 Academy Award for Best Original Song?
questions.explanation: 'Naatu Naatu' from RRR won the Academy Award for Best Original Song at the 2023 Oscars.

questions.q: Who composed the music for the film RRR, including the song 'Naatu Naatu'?
questions.explanation: M. M. Keeravani composed the music for RRR, including the Oscar-winning 'Naatu Naatu'.

questions.q: Which two actors play the lead revolutionaries in the 2022 film RRR?
options: N. T. Rama Rao Jr. and Ram Charan
questions.explanation: RRR stars N. T. Rama Rao Jr. and Ram Charan in the lead roles.

questions.q: The film RRR is set primarily in which decade?
questions.explanation: RRR is a period drama set in the 1920s during British colonial rule in India.

questions.q: Which historical figure does N. T. Rama Rao Jr. portray in the film RRR?
questions.explanation: N. T. Rama Rao Jr. plays a fictionalised version of tribal leader Komaram Bheem in RRR.

questions.q: Which historical figure does Ram Charan portray in the film RRR?
questions.explanation: Ram Charan plays a fictionalised version of revolutionary Alluri Sitarama Raju in RRR.

questions.q: Against which colonial power are the heroes of the 2022 film RRR shown fighting?
questions.explanation: The heroes of RRR fight against British colonial rule in 1920s India.

questions.q: At which 2023 awards ceremony did 'Naatu Naatu' from RRR also win Best Original Song before the Oscars?
questions.explanation: 'Naatu Naatu' won Best Original Song at the 2023 Golden Globe Awards, a first for an Indian film.

questions.q: Who wrote the lyrics for the original Telugu version of 'Naatu Naatu' in the film RRR?
questions.explanation: Chandrabose wrote the Telugu lyrics for 'Naatu Naatu'.

questions.q: Which two singers performed the original Telugu version of 'Naatu Naatu' in RRR?
questions.explanation: Rahul Sipligunj and Kaala Bhairava sang the original Telugu 'Naatu Naatu'.

questions.q: What does the title 'RRR' originally stand for as branded by the makers of the 2022 film?
questions.explanation: The film's title was branded 'Rise Roar Revolt' in English.

questions.q: Which British actress plays Jennifer ('Jenny'), the love interest of Komaram Bheem, in the film RRR?
questions.explanation: Olivia Morris plays Jenny, who befriends Bheem, in RRR.

questions.q: Which actor plays Governor Scott Buxton, the main British antagonist, in the film RRR?
questions.explanation: Ray Stevenson plays Governor Scott Buxton in RRR.

questions.q: Where was the song 'Naatu Naatu' from RRR primarily filmed?
questions.explanation: 'Naatu Naatu' was shot in front of the Mariinsky Palace in Kyiv, Ukraine.

questions.q: Which actress plays Sita, the love interest of Ram, in the film RRR?
questions.explanation: Alia Bhatt plays Sita in RRR, marking her Telugu cinema debut.

questions.q: Which veteran Bollywood actor plays Venkata Rama Raju, Ram's father, in the film RRR?
questions.explanation: Ajay Devgn appears in an extended cameo as Venkata Rama Raju in RRR.

questions.q: Who served as the cinematographer for the 2022 film RRR?
questions.explanation: K. K. Senthil Kumar was the cinematographer of RRR, a frequent Rajamouli collaborator.

questions.q: Under which production banner was the 2022 film RRR produced?
questions.explanation: RRR was produced by D. V. V. Danayya under his DVV Entertainment banner.

questions.q: How long did RRR's song 'Naatu Naatu' run as a sequence, a single elaborate dance number in the film?
questions.explanation: 'Naatu Naatu' is an elaborate set-piece song roughly three minutes long, famous for its high-energy 'hook step' choreography.

questions.q: Which choreographer won the National Film Award for the dance in 'Naatu Naatu' from RRR?
questions.explanation: Prem Rakshith choreographed 'Naatu Naatu' and won the National Film Award for Best Choreography for it.

questions.q: At the 95th Academy Awards, how many Oscar nominations did the film RRR receive?
options: Three nominations, of which it won two
Two nominations, of which it won both
One nomination, 'Naatu Naatu' for Best Original Song, which won
It was nominated for Best International Feature and won
questions.explanation: RRR's sole Oscar nomination was 'Naatu Naatu' for Best Original Song, which it won.

questions.q: Which song on the RRR soundtrack is the film's anthem celebrating the friendship between its two heroes?
questions.explanation: 'Dosti' is the friendship anthem on the RRR soundtrack celebrating the bond between Ram and Bheem.

questions.q: The character Komaram Bheem in RRR is inspired by a real tribal leader from which present-day Indian state?
questions.explanation: The real Komaram Bheem was a Gond tribal leader from the Adilabad region of present-day Telangana.

questions.q: The real Alluri Sitarama Raju, who inspires Ram's character in RRR, led which historical uprising against the British?
questions.explanation: Alluri Sitarama Raju led the Rampa Rebellion of 1922-24 in the Godavari region against the British.

questions.q: M. M. Keeravani, composer of RRR, accepted the Oscar for 'Naatu Naatu' with a speech sung to the tune of which band's song?
questions.explanation: Keeravani sang his Oscar acceptance speech to the tune of The Carpenters' 'Top of the World'.

questions.q: Approximately what was the production budget of the 2022 film RRR, making it one of the most expensive Indian films?
questions.explanation: RRR was made on a budget of roughly 550 crore, among the costliest Indian films ever produced.

questions.q: Which earlier two-part epic by S. S. Rajamouli immediately preceded RRR and also broke pan-India box-office records?
questions.explanation: Rajamouli directed the two-part Baahubali franchise (2015 and 2017) just before making RRR.
